unitWeights.title: Sustained Investigation: Practice, Experimentation, and Revision
Selected Works: Skillful Synthesis of Materials, Processes, and Ideas

scoringNotes: Portfolio scored by readers. Sustained Investigation (60%): 15 images plus written responses about practice, experimentation, and revision. Selected Works (40%): 5 works demonstrating skillful synthesis. Scored on a 1-5 AP scale.

specialPolicies.deliveryNotes: No timed exam. Portfolio submitted digitally through the AP Digital Portfolio. Students submit throughout the course and finalize by the portfolio deadline.
